hero.headline: Clear pricing for websites and content
hero.sub: Starting prices for one-time projects and ongoing plans. Final quotes depend on scope — every package explains who it is for, what you get, and the next step.

tiers.name: Service Pro
tiers.description: Perfect for local service providers needing a professional ongoing presence.
oneTimeIncludes: Up to 5 pages in your Webflow account
Lead capture forms wired to email
monthlyIncludes: 2 queued site updates per month (~2–3 day turnaround)
CMS support in your Webflow account
notIncluded: Custom logo or brand identity design
tiers.whoFor: Perfect for local service providers needing a professional ongoing presence.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.description: Advanced features and integrations for scaling businesses and restaurants.
monthlyIncludes: Dedicated GoHighLevel sub-account managed by SWFT
notIncluded: SMS/phone usage beyond fair-use caps (billed at cost or quoted)
Custom logo or full brand identity
tiers.whoFor: Advanced features and integrations for scaling businesses and restaurants.

tiers.name: E-Commerce
tiers.description: Full managed online store support and continuous optimization.
oneTimeIncludes: Custom Shopify storefront in your account
notIncluded: Paid ad spend or media buying
tiers.whoFor: Full managed online store support and continuous optimization.

contentCreation.label: Content Creation
contentCreation.monthlyOnlyNote: Content plans are monthly retainers. Book a discovery call to scope a one-off content day.

tiers.name: Content Starter
tiers.description: Monthly essential photos and updates to keep your social feeds fresh.
monthlyIncludes: 1 half-day shoot per month (or equivalent photo batch)
10–15 edited photos sized for web + social
4–6 Canva-based social/ad templates customized to your brand
notIncluded: Custom logo or full brand identity
tiers.timeline: Ongoing monthly; first shoot scheduled after kickoff

tiers.name: Content Growth
tiers.description: Comprehensive photo and short-form video system for active brands.
monthlyIncludes: Canva ad creative sets + light motion graphics
tiers.timeline: Ongoing monthly; first shoot scheduled after kickoff

tiers.name: Content Pro
tiers.description: Full-scale production. Premium cinematic video and extensive photo coverage.
monthlyIncludes: Freelancer budget for logos, decks, and campaign graphics
tiers.timeline: Ongoing monthly; first shoot scheduled after kickoff

bundle.name: Website + Content Starter Package
bundle.description: The complete entry package for businesses serious about showing up online. A Service Pro website build paired with ongoing Content Starter production so your site and social stay aligned.
includes: One-time website build (Service Pro scope — up to 5 pages)
Optional: upgrade to Growth (+$200/mo) for GoHighLevel automations

bookCta.headline: Not sure which package fits?
bookCta.quote: Start with a free Growth Audit — then we match you to the right scope.
bookCta.sub: Get a personalized review of your website, social presence, and customer journey.

faq.a: GoHighLevel automations are included on Growth ($400/mo) and E-Commerce ($500/mo) website plans only. Service Pro ($200/mo) is website management without GHL. You can upgrade from the bundle or Service Pro anytime.

faq.q: What does monthly website management include?
faq.a: Service Pro covers site updates, monitoring, and CMS support. Growth and E-Commerce add a managed GoHighLevel sub-account with missed-call text-back, CRM pipeline, review automation, and booking flows.

All content plans are monthly retainers with shoots, edited photos/video, and Canva-based social assets. Custom logos and full brand identity are not included on Starter — they're available on Content Pro or as a separate quote.
The Website + Content Starter Package is $1,200 setup (Service Pro website build) + $600/mo (Content Starter retainer). Add Growth automations for +$200/mo on top of your website plan.

faq.q: Do I need the monthly plan?
faq.a: No. One-time website builds hand off with full CMS access in your Webflow or Shopify account. Monthly is for owners who want ongoing updates, monitoring, and support without doing it themselves.
One-time builds include 2 free revisions within 30 days of launch. After that, contact us for current revision rates or move to a monthly plan.
Yes. Monthly plans can be paused or cancelled. We'll confirm terms on your Growth Audit before you commit.
Request a free Growth Audit. We'll review your online presence and recommend the right website, content, or lead-system package — with starting prices based on scope.
